div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
POST /dca/crawl?collector=c_*&timeout=50s
REALTIME sync
body: {url}
→ rows inline OR 202 + z*

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
GET /dca/dataset?id=j_*
202 building until ready
200 rows when done

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Push delivery: webhook / S3 / GCS / SFTP / Azure / Email / Ali OSS
configured in collector.deliver

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
GET /dca/log/{job_id}
Status, Success_rate, Lines, Pages, Job_time, ...
